name: Spinning Text Demo
visual_summary: A spinning text component with a dynamic text animation. It is used when showcasing dynamic or interactive content on a page. This component provides a visually appealing way to display text in motion.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Spinning Text Demo
Description: A spinning text component with a dynamic text animation. It is used when showcasing dynamic or interactive content on a page. This component provides a visually appealing way to display text in motion.
Style: default, minimalist
Interactions: animated
Tags: animation, text

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { SpinningText } from "@/registry/magicui/spinning-text"

export default function SpinningTextBasic() {
  return <SpinningText>learn more • earn more • grow more •</SpinningText>
}
